requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety and Voltage Compatibility — 110–120 V / 60 Hz / Type A-B Plugs (NORDOM / IEC 60950 / IEC 62368 Series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全与电压兼容性——110–120V / 60Hz / A-B型插头（NORDOM / IEC 60950 / IEC 62368系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全與電壓相容性——110–120V / 60Hz / A/B型插頭（NORDOM / IEC 60950 / IEC 62368系列）

summary.en: The Dominican Republic uses 110–120 V AC / 60 Hz electricity with Type A (two flat parallel pins) and Type B (two flat parallel pins plus a grounding pin) plugs — the same standard as the United States and Canada. This is consistent with CAFTA-DR trade partner alignment. All wireless and IoT devices sold in the Dominican Republic must be designed for 110–120 V / 60 Hz operation and must use or be compatible with Type A/B plugs; Chinese devices designed for 220 V / 50 Hz with Type I or European plugs will require electrical adaptation or redesign. Electrical safety requirements are governed by NORDOM standards harmonised with IEC 60950-1 (legacy) and IEC 62368-1 (current) for audio/video and IT equipment. Accredited laboratory electrical safety test reports compliant with applicable IEC/NORDOM standards must be included in the INDOTEL homologación technical dossier. Power adapters shipped with Chinese devices must also comply with the 110–120 V / 60 Hz / Type A-B electrical standard.
summary.zh: 多米尼加共和国使用110–120V交流/60Hz电力，采用A型（两个扁平平行插脚）和B型（两个扁平平行插脚加接地插脚）插头——与美国和加拿大相同标准，符合CAFTA-DR贸易伙伴对齐。所有在多米尼加共和国销售的无线物联网设备须设计为110–120V/60Hz运行，并须使用或兼容A/B型插头；为220V/50Hz及I型或欧式插头设计的中国设备须进行电气适配或重新设计。电气安全要求由与IEC 60950-1（旧版）及IEC 62368-1（现行版，适用于音视频和IT设备）协调的NORDOM标准管辖。符合适用IEC/NORDOM标准的经认可实验室电气安全检测报告须纳入INDOTEL型式认可技术文件。随中国设备附送的电源适配器也须符合110–120V/60Hz/A-B型电气标准。
summary.zht: 多明尼加共和國使用110–120V交流/60Hz電力，採用A型（兩個扁平平行插腳）和B型（兩個扁平平行插腳加接地插腳）插頭——與美國和加拿大相同標準，符合CAFTA-DR貿易夥伴對齊。所有在多明尼加共和國銷售的無線物聯網裝置須設計為110–120V/60Hz運行，並須使用或相容A/B型插頭；為220V/50Hz及I型或歐式插頭設計的中國裝置須進行電氣適配或重新設計。電氣安全要求由與IEC 60950-1（舊版）及IEC 62368-1（現行版，適用於音視頻和IT裝置）協調的NORDOM標準管轄。符合適用IEC/NORDOM標準的經認可實驗室電氣安全檢測報告須納入INDOTEL型式認可技術文件。隨中國裝置附送的電源適配器也須符合110–120V/60Hz/A/B型電氣標準。

standards_or_laws: NORDOM electrical safety standards — Dominican national electrical safety standards harmonised with IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1 for IT and audio/video equipment
IEC 62368-1 — current international standard for audio/video, information and communications technology equipment safety (supersedes IEC 60950-1)
IEC 60950-1 — legacy international information technology equipment safety standard (still referenced in some NORDOM contexts)
Dominican Republic grid standard: 110–120 V AC / 60 Hz; Type A (NEMA 1-15) and Type B (NEMA 5-15) plugs

summary.en: China's standard electrical supply is 220 V AC / 50 Hz with Type I (Australian-style, AS/NZS 3112) plugs, which differs from the Dominican Republic's 110–120 V / 60 Hz / Type A-B system. Chinese consumer electronics and wireless devices are typically designed for 220 V / 50 Hz operation and fitted with Type I (or Type A in some export models) plugs. Electrical safety in China is certified through the mandatory CCC process (GB 4943.1 series, harmonised with IEC 60950-1 / 62368-1) administered by CNCA-designated laboratories. Chinese CCC electrical safety certificates are not recognised by DIGENOR or INDOTEL, and the voltage/frequency/plug standard differs fundamentally from the Dominican market.
summary.zh: 中国标准供电为220V交流/50Hz，采用I型（澳式，AS/NZS 3112）插头，与多米尼加共和国的110–120V/60Hz/A-B型系统不同。中国消费电子和无线设备通常设计为220V/50Hz运行，配备I型（或部分出口型号配A型）插头。中国电气安全通过CNCA指定实验室的强制CCC认证（GB 4943.1系列，与IEC 60950-1/62368-1协调）进行认证。中国CCC电气安全证书不被DIGENOR或INDOTEL承认，电压/频率/插头标准与多米尼加市场存在根本差异。
summary.zht: 中國標準供電為220V交流/50Hz，採用I型（澳式，AS/NZS 3112）插頭，與多明尼加共和國的110–120V/60Hz/A/B型系統不同。中國消費電子和無線裝置通常設計為220V/50Hz運行，配備I型（或部分出口型號配A型）插頭。中國電氣安全通過CNCA指定實驗室的強制CCC認證（GB 4943.1系列，與IEC 60950-1/62368-1協調）進行認證。中國CCC電氣安全證書不被DIGENOR或INDOTEL承認，電壓/頻率/插頭標準與多明尼加市場存在根本差異。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Chinese information technology equipment electrical safety standard (harmonised with IEC 60950-1/62368-1); required for CCC certification
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — includes electrical safety testing for consumer electronics under CNCA
China grid standard: 220 V AC / 50 Hz; Type I plugs (AS/NZS 3112 style) dominant; some Type A used in export-oriented designs

gap.en: The Dominican Republic's 110–120 V / 60 Hz / Type A-B electrical standard differs fundamentally from China's 220 V / 50 Hz / Type I system. Chinese devices must be verified — and if necessary, redesigned or adapted — to operate safely and correctly on 110–120 V / 60 Hz power, and must use or be compatible with Type A/B plugs. Power adapters supplied with Chinese devices must also meet the 110–120 V / Type A-B standard. Chinese CCC electrical safety test reports (issued for 220 V / 50 Hz conditions) do not satisfy NORDOM/INDOTEL requirements for the Dominican market; new IEC 62368-1-compliant electrical safety testing at 110–120 V / 60 Hz conditions from an internationally accredited laboratory is required for the INDOTEL homologación dossier. IEC 62368-1-based CE electrical safety reports, if tested under conditions applicable to the Dominican voltage range, may assist as supporting documentation subject to INDOTEL acceptance.
gap.zh: 多米尼加共和国的110–120V/60Hz/A-B型电气标准与中国的220V/50Hz/I型系统存在根本差异。中国设备须经过验证——必要时须重新设计或适配——以在110–120V/60Hz电源下安全正常运行，并须使用或兼容A/B型插头。随中国设备附送的电源适配器也须符合110–120V/A-B型标准。中国CCC电气安全检测报告（在220V/50Hz条件下出具）不满足多米尼加市场的NORDOM/INDOTEL要求；INDOTEL型式认可文件须提供来自国际认可实验室、在110–120V/60Hz条件下进行的符合IEC 62368-1的全新电气安全检测报告。若基于IEC 62368-1的CE电气安全报告在适用多米尼加电压范围的条件下测试，在经INDOTEL接受的前提下可作为支持性文件。
gap.zht: 多明尼加共和國的110–120V/60Hz/A/B型電氣標準與中國的220V/50Hz/I型系統存在根本差異。中國裝置須經過驗證——必要時須重新設計或適配——以在110–120V/60Hz電源下安全正常運行，並須使用或相容A/B型插頭。隨中國裝置附送的電源適配器也須符合110–120V/A/B型標準。中國CCC電氣安全檢測報告（在220V/50Hz條件下出具）不滿足多明尼加市場的NORDOM/INDOTEL要求；INDOTEL型式認可文件須提供來自國際認可實驗室、在110–120V/60Hz條件下進行的符合IEC 62368-1的全新電氣安全檢測報告。若基於IEC 62368-1的CE電氣安全報告在適用多明尼加電壓範圍的條件下測試，在經INDOTEL接受的前提下可作為支持性文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — devices must be designed for 110–120 V / 60 Hz / Type A-B plug compatibility; IEC 62368-1 (or IEC 60950-1) electrical safety testing at correct voltage/frequency required for INDOTEL homologación dossier; CCC electrical safety certificates not recognised
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4943.1 electrical safety certification (220 V / 50 Hz) required through CCC process under CNCA; Chinese grid is 220 V / 50 Hz / Type I

source.publisher: DIGENOR — Dirección General de Normas y Sistemas de Calidad (Dominican Republic)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Dominican Republic uses 110–120 V / 60 Hz / Type A-B plugs — fundamentally different from China's 220 V / 50 Hz / Type I system. Chinese devices designed for 220 V / 50 Hz require verification or adaptation, and new IEC 62368-1-compliant electrical safety testing at the correct voltage and frequency from an internationally accredited laboratory is required for the INDOTEL homologación dossier. CCC electrical safety certificates issued for 220 V conditions are not accepted. Verify current NORDOM electrical safety standards, INDOTEL dossier requirements, and plug/voltage specifications with a qualified Dominican regulatory professional before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 多米尼加共和国采用110–120V/60Hz/A-B型插头，与中国220V/50Hz/I型系统存在根本差异。为220V/50Hz设计的中国设备须经过验证或适配，INDOTEL型式认可文件须提供来自国际认可实验室在正确电压和频率条件下进行的符合IEC 62368-1的电气安全检测报告。在220V条件下出具的CCC电气安全证书不被接受。进入市场前请向合格的多米尼加监管专业人士核验现行NORDOM电气安全标准、INDOTEL文件要求及插头/电压规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 多明尼加共和國採用110–120V/60Hz/A/B型插頭，與中國220V/50Hz/I型系統存在根本差異。為220V/50Hz設計的中國裝置須經過驗證或適配，INDOTEL型式認可文件須提供來自國際認可實驗室在正確電壓和頻率條件下進行的符合IEC 62368-1的電氣安全檢測報告。在220V條件下出具的CCC電氣安全證書不被接受。進入市場前請向合格的多明尼加監管專業人士核驗現行NORDOM電氣安全標準、INDOTEL文件要求及插頭/電壓規格。
